ValidationRule.description: Both Insolvency or Insolvency Account are missing while rcord update
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser, AND ( Not(ISNEW()), or( ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Assignment_Type__c), ISCHANGED(RecordTypeId) ), RecordType.Name <> 'EmailToCase', RecordType.Name <> 'Remittance', RecordType.Name <> 'Canaccede_EmailToCase', RecordType.Name <> 'Canaccede EmailToCase', RecordType.Name <> 'Flexiti CCS Case', RecordType.Name <> 'CCS Case', RecordType.Name <> 'CCS Dividend', RecordType.Name <> 'Web To Case', OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Assignment_Type__c, 'Business Insolvency')), CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Community') ), ISBLANK(Insolvency_Account__c), ISBLANK(Insolvency__c) ), AND ( Not(ISNEW()), or( ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Assignment_Type__c), ISCHANGED(RecordTypeId) ), RecordType.Name <> 'EmailToCase', RecordType.Name <> 'Remittance', RecordType.Name <> 'Canaccede_EmailToCase', RecordType.Name <> 'Canaccede EmailToCase', RecordType.Name <> 'Flexiti CCS Case', RecordType.Name <> 'CCS Case', RecordType.Name <> 'CCS Dividend', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Assignment_Type__c, 'Secured Communications')), ISBLANK(Insolvency_Account__c), ISBLANK(Insolvency__c) ), AND ( Not(ISNEW()), or( ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Assignment_Type__c), ISCHANGED(RecordTypeId) ), RecordType.Name <> 'EmailToCase', RecordType.Name <> 'Remittance', RecordType.Name <> 'Canaccede_EmailToCase', RecordType.Name <> 'Canaccede EmailToCase', RecordType.Name <> 'Flexiti CCS Case', RecordType.Name <> 'CCS Case', RecordType.Name <> 'CCS Dividend', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Assignment_Type__c, 'Final')), ISBLANK(Insolvency_Account__c), ISBLANK(Insolvency__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select Insolvency or Insolvency Account
